payload.description:
Build the Plexus-side client that talks to OpenSearch. This is a thin adapter layer (`TopicMemoryIndex`) wrapping the `opensearch-py` library with AWS SigV4 auth, tested with mocks. It depends on the infra repo only for configuration values (endpoint, role ARN), which are injected.

## Definition of Done

- `TopicMemoryIndex` class in `plexus/analysis/opensearch_client.py`
- Connection via IAM SigV4 auth with health check
- Bulk indexing with timestamped index creation
- Atomic blue/green alias swap with old index cleanup
- KNN search for nearest cluster assignment
- Partial failure handling and logging
- All scenarios in child stories pass

## Depends On

- Epic plx-46f6f0 (Embedding Cache) — for embedding vector format
- Epic plx-46723f (CDK Infra) — for endpoint/schema shape

## Key Files

- Create: `plexus/analysis/opensearch_client.py`
- Create: `plexus/analysis/opensearch_client_test.py`
- Modify: `pyproject.toml` (add `opensearch-py>=2.4.0`, `requests-aws4auth>=1.2.3`)
payload.title: OpenSearch Client in Plexus
